name: Redback Networks, Inc.
description: Redback Networks, Inc. was a prominent provider of advanced telecommunications networking equipment, specializing in hardware and software solutions for Internet service providers to manage broadband services. Founded in 1996 and headquartered in the United States, the company developed key product lines such as the Subscriber Management System (SMS), SmartEdge, and SmartMetro. These technologies were essential for managing subscriber sessions and traffic in high-speed networks. In January 2007, Redback Networks was acquired by Ericsson, integrating its expertise into the global telecommunications infrastructure market.
